mnemonics: BEST GRAPH RESOURCES: Books, E-Links, Sites, Tutorials Guide Researchers, Helping Articles, Papers
keyPoints: Identify core textbooks recommended by your syllabus for foundational knowledge.
Utilize online platforms like Khan Academy, Coursera, or YouTube channels for visual explanations of algorithms.
Practice by solving problems from standard books and previous years' question papers to apply concepts.
commonMistakes: Relying solely on lecture notes and not consulting the broader, suggested learning resources.
Attempting to memorize algorithms instead of understanding the logic and steps through practice.
Ignoring the practical implementation of algorithms using software tools or programming.
